requirement_topic.en: Ministry of Environment / KECO Public EV Charging Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: 环境部 / KECO 公共电动汽车充电要求
requirement_topic.zht: 環境部 / KECO 公共電動汽車充電要求

summary.en: South Korea's public EV charging ecosystem is shaped by Ministry of Environment programs and Korea Environment Corporation (KECO) administration for charger deployment, operation, public charging access, and related support programs. Public or subsidised chargers may need to satisfy Korean operating-system, user access, data, payment, maintenance, and reporting requirements in addition to KC product safety and KEPCO grid approval.
summary.zh: 韩国公共电动汽车充电生态由环境部项目及韩国环境公团（KECO）管理机制影响，涵盖充电桩部署、运营、公共充电接入及相关支持项目。公共或补贴类充电桩除 KC 产品安全和 KEPCO 电网批准外，还可能需要满足韩国运营系统、用户接入、数据、支付、维护和报告要求。
summary.zht: 韓國公共電動汽車充電生態由環境部項目及韓國環境公團（KECO）管理機制影響，涵蓋充電樁部署、運營、公共充電接入及相關支持項目。公共或補貼類充電樁除 KC 產品安全和 KEPCO 電網批准外，還可能需要滿足韓國運營系統、用戶接入、數據、支付、維護和報告要求。

standards_or_laws: Ministry of Environment EV charging infrastructure programs
Korea Environment Corporation EV charging administration and public-service requirements
Korean public charging operation, access, payment and reporting requirements

summary.en: China has its own national and local charging-platform, payment, data and subsidy rules. Chinese platform connectivity, app payment, domestic operator filing, or GB/T evidence does not establish eligibility for Korean public charging programs or KECO-administered deployment requirements.
summary.zh: 中国有自身的国家和地方充电平台、支付、数据及补贴规则。中国平台连接、App 支付、国内运营商备案或 GB/T 证据，不能证明符合韩国公共充电项目或 KECO 管理部署要求。
summary.zht: 中國有自身的國家和地方充電平台、支付、數據及補貼規則。中國平台連接、App 支付、國內運營商備案或 GB/T 證據，不能證明符合韓國公共充電項目或 KECO 管理部署要求。

standards_or_laws: China local EV charging operation rules

gap.en: For Korean public or subsidised deployments, confirm the KECO or Ministry of Environment program conditions before choosing hardware and software. Expected gaps can include Korean-language user interface, payment method support, roaming or membership integration, uptime and maintenance obligations, remote monitoring, data reporting, and charger identification. These are operational compliance requirements beyond product electrical safety.
gap.zh: 面向韩国公共或补贴类部署时，应在选择硬件和软件前确认 KECO 或环境部项目条件。常见差距可能包括韩文用户界面、支付方式支持、漫游或会员系统集成、在线率和维护义务、远程监控、数据上报以及充电桩识别。这些属于产品电气安全之外的运营合规要求。
gap.zht: 面向韓國公共或補貼類部署時，應在選擇硬體和軟體前確認 KECO 或環境部項目條件。常見差距可能包括韓文用戶界面、支付方式支援、漫遊或會員系統整合、在線率和維護義務、遠程監控、數據上報以及充電樁識別。這些屬於產品電氣安全之外的運營合規要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory when participating in relevant Korean public, subsidised, or regulated charging programs; otherwise a practical market-access requirement for public operators.
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese charging-operation approvals or platform integrations do not replace Korean program conditions.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Public Korean charging deployments can require KECO or Ministry of Environment program compliance in addition to KC safety and KEPCO grid approval. China-market platform readiness is not enough.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 韩国公共充电部署除 KC 安全和 KEPCO 电网批准外，可能还需满足 KECO 或环境部项目合规要求。仅具备中国市场平台能力并不足够。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 韓國公共充電部署除 KC 安全和 KEPCO 電網批准外，可能還需滿足 KECO 或環境部項目合規要求。僅具備中國市場平台能力並不足夠。
